title: MT-new: Terminal CCA chat self-chaining (Codex S256)
body: Codex confirmed: standalone terminal cca chat cannot self-chain. Desktop Electron autoloop works; CLI outer-loop (start_autoloop.sh) works; one-off terminal session cannot launch next session. Add self-chaining so cca wrap in terminal fires autoloop without needing start_autoloop.sh. Do NOT break desktop autoloop.
